title: Google Just Dropped The Singularity Bomb
summary: Demis Hassabis claims humanity may be at the foothills of the singularity as AI agents now perform coding, research, and scientific tasks. Google DeepMind, AWS, and other organizations are releasing agent-based systems that speed up real work across multiple domains.
